corrections.text: The article states reMarkable 'cut up to 200 employees.' None of the three cited sources specify a headcount: the Engadget review (the source cited) says only that reMarkable was 'slashing its workforce and firing CEO Phil Hess.' The figure '200' is not attributed to any cited source and should be read as unverified.

The article attributes the 'E Ink Carta 1300' display identification to TechCrunch. TechCrunch's article names only the resolution (1,872 x 1,404 pixels) and pixel density (226 PPI); the Carta 1300 panel designation appears in the Engadget review, not TechCrunch. The fact is correct; the outlet attribution is wrong.
